name: Where The Crows Roam
short_description: Where The Crows Roam is a survival horror game made by a sixth grader in his free time. In this game you will get to explore the now deserted Stunig City and its outer ruins. Watch your back because you never know what is watching you. Can you survive?
detailed_description: Where The Crows Roam is a survival horror game made by a sixth grader in his free time. In this game you will get to explore the now deserted Stunig City and its outer ruins. Watch your back because you never know what is watching you. Can you survive Dr. Montana and his cult or will you fall short and be killed like the rest. You will solve basic puzzles, explore the unique world of Where The Crows Roam and uncover the horrible truth of what happened in this expansive city.
